changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW view_score_from_last_month AS SELECT SUM(IF(A.confirm_flg != 'N' AND (A.final_type IS NULL OR A.final_type != 4), IFNULL(A.adult_count, 0) * SUBSTRING_INDEX(A.product_value, ',', 1) + IFNULL(A.special_count, 0) * SUBSTRING_INDEX(A.product_value, ',', - 1), 0)) AS score, SUM(IF(A.confirm_flg != 'N' AND (A.final_type IS NULL OR A.final_type != 4) AND 11 > SUBSTRING_INDEX(LEFT(A.confirm_date, 10), '-', - 1), (IFNULL(A.adult_count, 0) + IFNULL(A.special_count, 0)), 0)) AS first_people, SUM(IF(A.confirm_flg != 'N' AND (A.final_type IS NULL OR A.final_type != 4) AND 11 > SUBSTRING_INDEX(LEFT(A.confirm_date, 10), '-', - 1), IFNULL(A.adult_count, 0) * SUBSTRING_INDEX(A.product_value, ',', 1) + IFNULL(A.special_count, 0) * SUBSTRING_INDEX(A.product_value, ',', - 1), 0)) AS first_score, SUM(IF(A.confirm_flg != 'N' AND (A.final_type IS NULL OR A.final_type != 4) AND (SUBSTRING_INDEX(LEFT(A.confirm_date, 10), '-', - 1) > 10 AND 21 > SUBSTRING_INDEX(LEFT(A.confirm_date, 10), '-', - 1)), (IFNULL(A.adult_count, 0) + IFNULL(A.special_count, 0)), 0)) AS middle_people, SUM(IF(A.confirm_flg != 'N' AND (A.final_type IS NULL OR A.final_type != 4) AND (SUBSTRING_INDEX(LEFT(A.confirm_date, 10), '-', - 1) > 10 AND 21 > SUBSTRING_INDEX(LEFT(A.confirm_date, 10), '-', - 1)), IFNULL(A.adult_count, 0) * SUBSTRING_INDEX(A.product_value, ',', 1) + IFNULL(A.special_count, 0) * SUBSTRING_INDEX(A.product_value, ',', - 1), 0)) AS middle_score, SUM(IF(A.confirm_flg != 'N' AND (A.final_type IS NULL OR A.final_type != 4) AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(LEFT(A.confirm_date, 10), '-', - 1) > 20, (IFNULL(A.adult_count, 0) + IFNULL(A.special_count, 0)), 0)) AS last_people, SUM(IF(A.confirm_flg != 'N' AND (A.final_type IS NULL OR A.final_type != 4) AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(LEFT(A.confirm_date, 10), '-', - 1) > 20, IFNULL(A.adult_count, 0) * SUBSTRING_INDEX(A.product_value, ',', 1) + IFNULL(A.special_count, 0) * SUBSTRING_INDEX(A.product_value, ',', - 1), 0)) AS last_score, LEFT(A.confirm_date, 7) AS confirm_month, A.sale AS sale_number, SUM(IF(A.confirm_flg != 'N' AND (A.final_type IS NULL OR A.final_type != 4), (IFNULL(A.adult_count, 0) + IFNULL(A.special_count, 0)), 0)) AS sum_people FROM budget_order_view A WHERE A.standard_flg = 'Y' AND A.confirm_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01') AND confirm_date < CURDATE() GROUP BY LEFT(A.confirm_date, 7) , A.sale;
CREATE VIEW view_score_from_last_month

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW view_score AS SELECT SUM((IFNULL(A.adult_count, 0) + IFNULL(A.special_count, 0)) * A.product_value) AS score, SUM(IF(LEFT(A.confirm_date, 7) = LEFT(CURDATE(), 7), (IFNULL(A.adult_count, 0) + IFNULL(A.special_count, 0)) * A.product_value, 0)) AS month_score, A.sale AS user_number, A.sale_name AS user_name FROM budget_order_view A WHERE A.standard_flg = 'Y' AND LEFT(A.confirm_date, 7) >= '2023-02' GROUP BY A.sale;
ALTER VIEW view_score

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE product ADD COLUMN adult_instant_bonus DECIMAL(12,2) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '成人立奖' AFTER id_type, ADD COLUMN child_instant_bonus DECIMAL(12,2) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '儿童立奖' AFTER adult_instant_bonus;
ALTER TABLE product

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE sale_order ADD COLUMN product_line VARCHAR(10) NULL COMMENT '产品线' AFTER final_receivable_comment, ADD COLUMN product_bonus VARCHAR(20) NULL COMMENT '产品立奖199.2,299.1表示成人立奖和儿童立奖' AFTER product_line;
ALTER TABLE sale_order

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW budget_order_view AS SELECT A.team_number, A.product_name, A.product_pk, A.product_model, A.client_employee_pk, D.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.budget_confirm_file, A.standard_flg, IFNULL(A.product_manager, C.product_manager) AS product_manager_number, CASE WHEN A.product_manager IS NOT NULL THEN I.user_name ELSE E.user_name END AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, A.receivable_comment, A.treat_comment, F.client_short_name AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date = '' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, A.product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date, A.assistant_number, G.user_name AS assistant_name, A.sale, H.user_name AS sale_name, A.final_type, A.raise_money, A.raise_comment, A.reduce_money, A.reduce_comment, A.complain_money, A.complain_reason, A.complain_solution, A.final_status, A.final_confirm_file, A.final_voucher_file, A.hotel_comment, A.as_adult_flg, A.final_receivable, A.final_receivable_comment, A.product_line, A.product_bonus FROM sale_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN product C ON A.product_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN client_employee D ON A.client_employee_pk = D.pk LEFT JOIN user_base E ON C.product_manager = E.user_number LEFT JOIN client F ON D.financial_body_pk = F.pk LEFT JOIN user_base G ON A.assistant_number = G.user_number LEFT JOIN user_base H ON A.sale = H.user_number LEFT JOIN user_base I ON A.product_manager = I.user_number;
ALTER VIEW budget_order_view

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE precise_client_employee ( name VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '真实姓名', is_verified CHAR(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT '是否实名', type VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT '未知' COMMENT '客户种类', gender CHAR(1) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '性别', wechat VARCHAR(20) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '微信', wechat1 VARCHAR(20) NULL DEFAULT NULL, cellphone VARCHAR(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '手机号', cellphone1 VARCHAR(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL, id VARCHAR(18) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '身份证号', financial_body_pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL COMMENT '财务主体', head_photo VARCHAR(26) NULL DEFAULT 'img', employee_area VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, employee_county VARCHAR(20) NULL DEFAULT NULL, detail_address VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT '详细地址', comment VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT NULL, binding_status CHAR(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT '关联状态', binding_count INT NULL COMMENT '关联数量', self_photo VARCHAR(26) NULL DEFAULT 'img' COMMENT '本人照片', other_photo VARCHAR(26) NULL DEFAULT 'img' COMMENT '其他照片', pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (pk)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '精准客户表';
CREATE TABLE precise_client_employee

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE precise_employee_binding ( precise_pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL COMMENT '精准客户Pk', employee_pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL COMMENT '客户资料pk', pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (pk)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '精准客户关联员工表';
CREATE TABLE precise_employee_binding

changeSet.author: simpletiny
